subcodes.first_line: O thou who knowest the worth of pearls! What are pearls and gems but divine verses and heavenly teachings, and praise of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گوهر دانی که در و گهر چیست آن آاین الهی و تعالیم ربانی و ستایش حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
